lastRunSummary: Built Game 48: Hangman's Bluff - interrogation deception, lie memory, 3-stage sheriff checkpoint, 37 tests pass

gameQueue.title: Lariat Spin
gameQueue.concept: Physics-based rope spinning skill game. Tap rhythmically to build angular momentum on a spinning lasso loop; the rope physics simulate circular tension, drift, and collapse. Once momentum is high enough, release at the precise angle to catch a moving target. Targets escalate in speed and height. First rotational physics / skill-toy mechanic in series.
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First rotational rope physics simulation (vs constraint-based pendulum in Last Rope Standing), first skill-toy mechanic (spinning, not throwing), first momentum-accumulation + precision-release dual-phase in series

gameQueue.title: Tin Pan Alley
gameQueue.concept: Frontier melody construction puzzle. A saloon piano plays a partial tune; player must fill in the missing notes by tapping the correct keys in sequence before the next measure. Difficulty escalates with phrase length and tempo. First note-sequencing / melody-completion mechanic - distinct from rhythm (Pony Express) and pitch matching (Coyote Call).
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First melody-completion mechanic (fill missing notes vs. hit beats vs. match pitch), first piano keyboard UI in series, first musical phrase-memory challenge

gameQueue.title: Pinkerton Trail
gameQueue.concept: Stealth pursuit game. You're a Pinkerton detective tailing a suspect through a frontier town. Follow without being spotted: hide behind barrels, time your movement to the suspect's glances, gather evidence before the suspect reaches safety. First tailing/pursuit stealth mechanic. Distinct from Jail Break (grid escape) and Moonshine Run (static hiding).
gameQueue.raisesBarOn: First pursuit-based stealth (follower vs. evader, not escapee), first evidence-gathering integration with stealth action, first dynamic NPC awareness system based on player proximity and line-of-sight while moving

runLog.summary: Fixed Midnight Rodeo: added roundRect polyfill (missing in Chrome <99/Safari <15.4) and touch-action:none on canvas. 36 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: added touchstart handler; devices that do not fire pointerdown for touch now respond. 38 tests pass.
Fixed Last Rope Standing: directional kick mechanic (KICK_FORCE=500) gives players speed to reach higher platforms. 55 tests pass.
Fixed Midnight Rodeo: iOS position:fixed viewport, load-event resize, document-level touch fallback, guard condition fix. 39 tests pass.
